channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senators Earn Convincing 5-2 Win Over Short-Handed Maple Leafs
item.description: The Ottawa Senators delivered a commanding performance against the Toronto Maple Leafs on Saturday night, securing a 5-2 victory over their provincial rivals. Goaltender Anthony Stolarz was slated to ...

item.title: Tinubu’s appointees reluctant to quit over fear of losing political relevance ahead of 2027 elections
item.description: Many of President Bola Tinubu’s ministers and senior political appointees are hesitating to resign despite the President’s directive that anyone eyeing elective office in 2027 must step down by March ...

item.title: Coles and Virgin Australia issue price warnings as energy costs rise
item.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) has urged Australians to limit air travel, car usage, and promote working from home, as the energy crisis intensifies due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. This di...

item.title: Environmental Groups Unite to Oppose Governor Hochul’s Push for New York Nuclear Expansion
item.description: More than a hundred environmental organizations across New York are joining forces to oppose Governor Kathy Hochul’s plan to make the state a central hub for nuclear power expansion. The initiative ha...

item.title: How Raila Odinga’s conflicting political styles are influencing ODM’s direction
item.description: This article argues that Raila Odinga has a dual personality in Kenyan politics: on one side, he is a fiery opposition leader who champions democracy and popular protest, while on the other side, he i...

item.title: Pule Mabe seeks protection order as domestic dispute with wife escalates
item.description: Former ANC national spokesperson Pule Mabe and his wife Elsie found themselves in a tense situation at a Johannesburg police station earlier this month. The incident reportedly began after a disagreem...

item.title: Nebraska Advances to Sweet 16 After Vanderbilt's Hail Mary Shot Misses at the Buzzer
item.description: Vanderbilt's basketball team was inches away from securing one of the most unforgettable moments in NCAA Tournament history. In a dramatic finish, Tyler Tanner's half-court heave as time expired nearl...

item.title: Gen Z in Kenya is Redefining Civic Engagement with Fresh Energy
item.description: In Kenya, Generation Z is leading a civic duty movement, showcasing newfound energy and collective participation in registering to vote. This wave, sparked by young people like Ademba Allans, has tran...

item.title: La Salle Displays Composure to Edge Adamson in UAAP Volleyball
item.description: De La Salle University's Lady Spikers showcased remarkable composure and resilience during their recent UAAP Season 88 volleyball match against Adamson University, according to assistant coach Noel Or...

item.title: Trump issues 48-hour ultimatum to Iran over Strait of Hormuz amid escalating US-Israel conflict and Iranian missile strikes on Israel
item.description: The ongoing US-Israel war on Iran, now in its fourth week since commencing on 28 February 2026, has seen significant escalation. US President Donald Trump issued a stark 48-hour ultimatum on Saturday,...

item.title: Pakistan Ranked First in Global Terrorism Index 2026 with 6% Rise in Terrorism Deaths in 2025

item.title: Ongoing US-Iran conflict escalates with Iranian missile strike on Diego Garcia base, fresh attack on Natanz nuclear site and rising regional tensions

item.title: Zuma’s Political Mourning Gesture Sparks Controversy
item.description: In his latest column, Hogarth reflects on former president Jacob Zuma’s recent visit to EFF leader Julius Malema’s family in Limpopo after the death of an elder. Zuma’s gesture of mourning with Malema...

item.title: High repair costs make even low-cost smartphones expensive to maintain
item.description: In Tanzania, smartphone users are realising that even affordable or older phones can be expensive to repair. Many people find that repair costs at formal service centres can approach the price of a ne...

item.title: Qatari Military Helicopter Crashes in Regional Waters Due to Technical Malfunction, Search Underway
item.description: According to Qatar's defence ministry, a military helicopter suffered a technical malfunction while on routine duty, resulting in a crash into the state's regional waters early on Sunday, March 22, 20...

item.title: Transport groups to suspend operations nationwide due to high fuel prices
item.description: The Alliance of Concerned Transport Organization (ACTO) announced that it will stage a nationwide transport holiday on March 23, 2026, in response to the continuous rise of fuel prices that have sever...

item.title: Your horoscope outlook for March 22, 2026
item.description: The horoscope for March 22, 2026, offers insights for each zodiac sign. For Aries, the focus is on imagination, encouraging new ideas with long-term potential. Taurus should trust their instincts, eve...
